funding.title: One quick step before you send
funding.lead: Your transactions run on a small {{symbol}} fee reserve. Add it once below — later transactions top it back up.
funding.statusConfirming: Your network fee is on its way — usually under a minute.
funding.networkHint: Withdrawing from an exchange? Choose the {{network}} network.
funding.qrHint: Scanning fills in the amount and network automatically
funding.detailsBody: It goes into a dedicated network-fee reserve that Vela maintains for you — one per network. It fronts the on-chain cost of your transactions and is replenished from each transaction's fee. It can only be spent on network fees and can't be withdrawn.
funding.denialDefault: The free top-up didn't go through this time. Add it below, or try again later.
funding.denialNotRecognized: Brand-new wallets can take a few minutes to be recognized — we'll retry the free top-up automatically. Or add it below to send right now.
funding.denialNonceExceeded: The free top-up covers a wallet's first few transactions, and this wallet is past that. Add it below to continue.
funding.denialTreasuryDepleted: Vela's free allowance is temporarily used up. Add it below, or check back later.
funding.denialBalanceTooLow: The free top-up needs your wallet to already hold some {{symbol}}. Receive some first, or add it below from any wallet or exchange.
funding.denialRateLimited: You were topped up just moments ago. If it's still short, add the difference below.
funding.denialTransferFailed: The free top-up transfer failed. Retry, or add it below.
funding.denialServiceUnavailable: The free top-up service is having a moment — we'll retry automatically. Or add it below.
funding.denialNetworkError: Couldn't reach Vela — check your connection. We'll retry automatically.
funding.denialPendingUnknown: Couldn't confirm the last top-up — watching your balance now. If nothing arrives shortly, add it below.

bugReport.title: Report a problem
bugReport.subtitle: Tell us what went wrong.
bugReport.whatPlaceholder: e.g. I tapped Send and the screen froze.
bugReport.consent: Only what you see is sent — never keys, seed phrase, or balances.
bugReport.successBodyNew: Logged as issue #{{number}}. You can follow it any time.
bugReport.successBodyDeduped: Added to an existing report (#{{number}}). Thanks for the extra signal!
bugReport.fallbackBody: We couldn't submit automatically, but we've prefilled a GitHub form with the details.
bugReport.openGithubForm: Prefer GitHub? Open the issue form →

signing.gasEstimateFailed: Couldn't estimate the gas fee — submitting may fail or time out. Tap the fee above to retry.
signing.historicalNote: A past signature — exactly what you approved.
signing.unlimitedWarning: Unlimited — this contract can spend all your tokens
signing.partialWarning: Incomplete — some details couldn't be decoded. Review carefully before approving.
signing.unverifiedWarning: Token amount couldn't be verified on-chain — double-check it before approving.
signing.blindTypedWarning: This typed data could not be decoded with a known descriptor. Review carefully.
signing.blindDecodeWarning: Unable to decode — no ERC-7730 descriptor ({{bytes}} bytes)
signing.bestEffortWarning: Decoded from the function signature — not a verified descriptor. Review the details carefully.
signing.bestEffortSimulated: Decoded from the function signature (not a verified descriptor). The preview below shows the actual effect.
signing.blindButSimulated: Vela couldn't read this contract's details, but the preview below shows exactly what this transaction does.
signing.simWillFail: This transaction is expected to fail — you’d still pay gas.
signing.simWillFailReason: Expected to fail: {{reason}} — you’d still pay gas.
signing.balanceMatchesHero: Simulated — nothing else leaves your wallet
signing.balanceUnderfundedNative: Not enough {{symbol}} to cover this transfer — it's expected to fail on-chain.
signing.tokenToContractWarning: This sends tokens to the token's own contract — they'd be lost forever.
signing.expiredWarning: The deadline on this transaction has already passed — it's expected to fail.
signing.siweMismatch: This sign-in is for {{domain}} but the request came from {{origin}}. Likely a phishing attempt — reject it.
signing.ethSignBody: This signs an opaque hash. A malicious site can hide a token transfer or approval behind it. Only continue if you fully trust this site and know exactly what you're signing.
signing.ethSignWarning: Unverifiable request — most legitimate apps never use eth_sign. Reject unless you're certain.
signing.balanceSelfTransfer: To your own address · balance won't change

scanner.title: Scan QR
scanner.hint: Point camera at a QR code
scanner.permissionText: Camera access is needed to scan QR codes.
scanner.noQrFoundMsg: Could not find a QR code in the selected image.

signingApprove.unlimitedDisabled: Unlimited approvals are disabled for your safety
signingApprove.revokeSummary: {{spender}} will no longer be able to spend this token.
signingApprove.choosePrompt: Set a finite amount to continue.
signingApprove.decimalsUnverified: Token decimals couldn’t be verified — double-check the amount.
signingApprove.setApprovalAllWarn: This lets {{operator}} transfer every NFT in this collection. Grant access to a single item instead when you can.
signingApprove.daiWarn: This grants {{spender}} access to your entire balance of this token.
signingApprove.chooseAction: Choose Revoke or Grant to continue.
signingApprove.resultingTotalUnknown: Adds {{amount}} on top of your current allowance (couldn't read the current amount)
signingApprove.permitCantCap: A permit is a signature — its amount can't be capped here. To limit spending, use an on-chain Approve instead.
signingApprove.permitNote: You're signing a spending permit — the dApp can move up to this amount on your behalf.

identiconViewer.title: Identicon
identiconViewer.caption: A visual fingerprint of this address — the same address always draws the same pattern, so you can recognise your account at a glance.
